summary: V1.6 spec created. Covers 3 P0 production blockers (OCR multipart boundary, Docker uploads permissions, bank PDF model mismatch), P1 UX improvements (toast errors, COUPLE_REQUIRED differentiation, budget ErrorState), P2 local PDF bank statement parser (PdfPig + regex for 7 banks), P3 feature enhancements (Quick Income modal, AI auto-categorization, Goals in AI chat, Visual Reports), and P4 App Usage Guide.
assumptions: V1.5 test baseline is >= 316 tests green before V1.6 work starts.
PdfPig (Apache 2.0) successfully extracts text from major Brazilian banks' standard PDF exports.
Tesseract.NET is available as optional fallback for scanned PDFs but not required for primary flow.
Existing IOcrProvider abstraction allows swapping to LocalPdfParserProvider via USE_LOCAL_PDF_PARSER env var.
IGoalRepository.GetByCouple(coupleId) can be created from existing Goal query infrastructure.
react-native-gifted-charts or victory-native is compatible with the current Expo SDK.
Reports bar/pie chart data can be derived from existing transactions table with GROUP BY queries — no new tables required.
Swile parser is nice-to-have; shipping without it does not block P2 milestone.
T-625r: Orchestrator dispatch used T-625 (already taken); added T-625r as the review-fix task ID to avoid conflict.
T-625r: UglyToad.PdfPig 1.7.0-custom-5 verified as valid on NuGet.org (published by grinay) — no version change needed.
T-625r: OcrCandidate.Type set to nullable TransactionType? — Azure OCR path leaves it null (no breaking change).
user_decisions: Priority banks for PDF parser: Inter, Banco do Brasil, Mercantil, Nubank, Caixa, Itau, Santander. Swile is nice-to-have.
PDF parsing approach: free open-source .NET-native. PdfPig for text-based PDFs; Tesseract as image fallback. NOT Azure Document Intelligence.
AI + Goals: YES — include goals progress/amounts/deadlines in AI chat system prompt.
Extra features selected: Quick income update modal, AI auto-categorization via Gemini, Visual reports (bar/pie charts).
All cloud services must remain 100% free tier.
